evidence: The paper states "Variable importance was assessed using permutation methods" and explicitly describes the methodology: "We used a model-agnostic method known as permutation-based variable importance (PVI) to explain the model predictions... The PVI was calculated and visualized using the DALEX and DALEXtra packages in R." The paper does not employ impurity-based importance (Gini/MDI/variance), so the documented impurity bias does not apply to their conclusions about which variables are most important.
